draft.title: a pastry shop
draft.summary: Drafting your prototype from the swipes…
draft.html:
a pastry shop

Building your first draft…

facade.hypothesis: Warm, diffused lighting creates intimate and calm atmosphere
facade.axisTargeted: warm vs cool + calm vs energetic
facade.label: Soft Lighting
facade.acceptImplies: User prefers cozy, inviting ambiance; soft mood lighting likely resonates
facade.rejectImplies: User may prefer brighter, more energetic spaces or cooler tones; intimacy less important than visibility or modernity

evidence.hypothesis: Warm, diffused lighting creates intimate and calm atmosphere
evidence.implication: User prefers cozy, inviting ambiance; soft mood lighting likely resonates

facade.hypothesis: The user may prefer gentle, approachable forms over angular or geometric sharpness in their pastry shop design
facade.label: Soft rounded corners
facade.acceptImplies: Emphasize warm, welcoming rounded edges in display cases, signage, and architectural elements
facade.rejectImplies: Explore clean, modern, or minimalist angular forms; potentially sleek, contemporary aesthetic over cozy warmth

facade.hypothesis: Pastry shop builders diverge sharply on whether to present baking instructions as narrative (cards, steps, story) vs structured data (tables, metrics, timing).
facade.label: Recipe cards or spreadsheet
facade.acceptImplies: User prefers guided, story-like presentation of recipes and processes—likely values clarity and accessibility over density.
facade.rejectImplies: User prefers scannable, metric-heavy formats—likely wants to optimize, compare, or troubleshoot recipes quickly.

facade.hypothesis: Users will prefer gradual, luxurious transitions over instant state changes in a pastry shop interface
facade.axisTargeted: Animation speed and easing — leisurely morphing vs snappy snaps
facade.label: Butter melts slow
facade.acceptImplies: Design favors fluid, anticipatory animations that feel tactile and indulgent; hover states linger; loading feels like a rise, not a flicker
facade.rejectImplies: Design favors immediacy and crispness; interactions snap into place; no delay between intent and result; efficiency over sensuality

facade.hypothesis: The user prefers a warm, personal, artisanal voice that signals small-batch care over corporate polish.
facade.axisTargeted: Branded vs neutral — specifically, does the pastry shop lean into handcrafted authenticity or polished professionalism?
facade.label: Charmingly handmade
facade.acceptImplies: Voice should feel tactile, human, slightly imperfect. Copy emphasizes 'made here,' 'small batch,' 'family recipe.' Friendly and approachable.
facade.rejectImplies: User prefers cleaner, more refined language. Voice should feel confident and curated rather than homespun. Possibly more minimalist or modern.

facade.hypothesis: A fixed left sidebar with soft colors and rounded corners creates an inviting, intimate feel that matches a pastry shop's artisanal brand
facade.axisTargeted: Navigation structure (sidebar vs. top tabs) + visual warmth (harsh vs. inviting)
facade.label: Warm, cozy sidebar
facade.acceptImplies: User wants browsing and ordering to feel personal and sheltered—small, curated product sections in a contained left panel; muted golds, creams, or terracotta accents
facade.rejectImplies: User prefers open, airy layouts—likely top navigation, cards spread across full width, bright or cool neutrals; less 'intimate boutique,' more 'modern bakery'

axes.label: Whether the user prefers a pastry shop with visible, artisanal display cases (transparent, inviting aesthetics) vs. a more minimalist or hidden-prep approach
Whether the user wants an open, browsable layout where they can walk around and select items themselves vs. a counter-service model where staff presents options
Whether the user responds to a warm, chatty, educational tone from staff (explaining ingredients, techniques) vs. efficient, no-frills service
Whether the user seeks a cozy, intimate café atmosphere vs. a bright, energetic, modern space
Whether the user values clear labeling, ingredient lists, and nutritional info prominently displayed vs. a more mysterious, trust-based approach
Whether the user prefers a shop with visible baking activity (ovens, prep work happening live) vs. a static display environment

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether the user prefers a pastry shop with visible, artisanal display cases (transparent, inviting aesthetics) vs. a more minimalist or hidden-prep approach
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Iris

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether the user wants an open, browsable layout where they can walk around and select items themselves vs. a counter-service model where staff presents options
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Prism

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether the user responds to a warm, chatty, educational tone from staff (explaining ingredients, techniques) vs. efficient, no-frills service
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Lumen

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether the user seeks a cozy, intimate café atmosphere vs. a bright, energetic, modern space
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Aura

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether the user values clear labeling, ingredient lists, and nutritional info prominently displayed vs. a more mysterious, trust-based approach
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Facet

scout_assignments.probe_axis: Whether the user prefers a shop with visible baking activity (ovens, prep work happening live) vs. a static display environment
scout_assignments.reason: Cold start: first question for Echo

facade.hypothesis: Cool, smooth, and polished surfaces create a more refined and less organic atmosphere, testing whether the user prefers natural warmth or elegant minimalism
facade.axisTargeted: organic vs digital / warm vs cool
facade.label: Marble countertops
facade.acceptImplies: User gravitates toward sophisticated, cool-toned, hard-edged luxury; may want contrast between cozy seating and sleek pastry display
facade.rejectImplies: User leans toward fully warm and natural aesthetic; prefers wood, stone texture, and handmade qualities throughout

draft.title: Artisan Pastry Shop
draft.summary: A warm, inviting pastry shop interface showcasing fresh baked goods with an earthy, bakery-inspired aesthetic. Users can browse featured pastries, view daily specials, and access shop information.
draft.html:
Artisan Pastry

Fresh baked daily

draft.title: a pastry shop
draft.summary: Warm, intimate pastry shop with soft, diffused lighting creating a calm and inviting atmosphere.
draft.html:
a pastry shop

Warm, intimate, and inviting

Soft Lighting

Warm, diffused lighting creates an intimate and calm atmosphere where every visit feels like a quiet moment of indulgence.

Atmosphere
Gentle Ambiance
Soft, warm light throughout the space invites you to linger and savor the moment.
draft.nextHint: Next, show me a pastry display style (open cases, hidden prep, minimalist counter) or a service interaction (browsing freely, ordering at counter, staff recommendations) to narrow down the layout.
